creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: naddy
Date: Fri Aug  3 20:29:53 UTC 2018
New revision: 476321
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/476321

Log:
  Move the numerical ID for the "_ntp" user, required for net/openntpd's
  privilege separation, after its value was usurped by the new "ntpd"
  user in 12.0-CURRENT.

  PR:		229936

Changes:
  head/GIDs
  head/UIDs
  head/UPDATING
  head/net/openntpd/Makefile
